We derive the scaling solution of [1] as the asymptotic of the full solution in the vicinity of the tricritical point separating the phases of dense and massive loops.
summary:
我们给出了[1]中引入的动力晶格上六顶点模型的一参数变形的完整解，称为引力七顶点模型。所讨论的统计模型被映射到动态三角测量上的自避环和相互避环的气体，温度耦合控制不被环占据的体积。与引力 O(n) 环模型类似，相图的特征是大量、稀和致密的临界相。然而，有一个重要的区别——在我们的模型中，环的权重不是拓扑的，而是取决于环的形式以及通过晶格自旋连接的晶格的曲率缺陷。然而，动态晶格上的七顶点模型在被重新表述为大 N 矩阵模型后仍然是精确可解的，我们将其称为 7vMM，并且在[1]中找到了缩放极限的解。在这里，我们根据雅可比 theta 函数导出完整解，并以参数形式呈现 7vMM 的（非代数）谱曲线。

我们获得了两个耦合常数（宇宙常数和温度）空间中的相图，并确定了沿物理域边界的临界相。我们将[1]的标度解推导出为分离密集环和大规模环的相的三临界点附近的完整解的渐近。

title: On the temperature dependence of quasinormal modes in SYK and holography
abstract: It was recently found that the quasinormal modes (or Ruelle--Pollicott resonances) of the SYK model at infinite temperature form a Christmas tree shape, reminiscent of AdS black holes. We generalise this computation to finite temperature, allowing us to continuously connect the infinite temperature results to the low temperature regime dual to JT gravity. We contrast the movement of the quasinormal modes with a few examples: various AdS black holes, dynamical phase transitions, and the large $p$ SYK chain. We find that the relaxation rate increases monotonically with temperature only at strong coupling, corresponding to the gravitational regime. Byproducts of our investigations are new results on operator growth that may be of independent interest.
summary: 最近发现，SYK 模型在无限温度下的拟正规模式（或 Ruelle--Pollicott 共振）形成圣诞树形状，让人想起 AdS 黑洞。我们将此计算推广到有限温度，使我们能够将无限温度结果连续连接到与 JT 重力对偶的低温状态。我们将准正规模的运动与几个例子进行对比：各种 AdS 黑洞、动态相变和大型 $p$ SYK 链。我们发现，仅在强耦合下，弛豫率随温度单调增加，这与引力状态相对应。我们调查的副产品是运营商增长的新结果，可能具有独立利益。

title: Unified theory of oscillons and modes
abstract: We show that an oscillon can be understood as a localized discrete resonant (non-normalizable) mode. Specifically, oscillon in the vacuum arises from the threshold mode, which because of nonlinearity gets localized. Following this idea, we find {\it wobblerons} - nonlinear excitations of kinks, that is, oscillons-kink bound state. Now, the oscillon can also originate in an antibound mode, i.e., a discrete, positive energy but non-normalizable mode.
summary: 我们证明振荡可以理解为局部离散谐振（不可归一化）模式。具体来说，真空中的振荡由阈值模式产生，由于非线性，阈值模式被局部化。遵循这个想法，我们找到了 {\it wobblerons} - 扭结的非线性激励，即振荡扭结束缚态。现在，振荡也可以起源于反束缚模式，即离散、正能量但不可归一化的模式。

title: UV-finite Effective Field Theory from Quantized Irreversible Null-geometry
abstract: Standard perturbative quantum field theory is persistently challenged by ultraviolet (UV) divergences and overlapping sub-divergences. In this work, we construct an absolutely UV-finite effective field theory (EFT) natively in four-dimensional spacetime. We embed the complete dynamical operator within a double-exponential capacity measure derived from quantized irreversible null-geometry. By analytically expanding the exact operator resolvent, we demonstrate that a universal macroscopic proper-time bound ($T \ge \tau_0$) natively emerges, structurally collapsing the high-order UV phase space via topological contraction. This mathematically defines the absolute UV boundary of the EFT. Consequently, overlapping subgraph divergences are rigorously identified as distributional pseudo-singularities caused by the continuous approximation analytically oversmoothing the discrete lattice bounds. These artifacts are systematically corrected by employing the Bogoliubov-Parasiuk-Hepp-Zimmermann (BPHZ) protocol strictly as an algebraic mapping operator. Evaluating Quantum Electrodynamics in 4D, we obtain a finite electron bare mass ($m_0 \approx 0.427$ MeV) and derive finite renormalization constants, analytically preserving the exact Ward-Takahashi identity ($Z_1=Z_2$). In Quantum Chromodynamics, the exact preservation of Slavnov-Taylor identities yields a calculable finite bare strong coupling ($\alpha_{s,0} \approx 0.0191$). Generating analytically closed non-perturbative Schwinger-Dyson Equations, this framework provides a consistent, anomaly-free mathematical foundation for finite effective field theories to address dynamic chiral symmetry breaking and mass generation.
summary:
标准微扰量子场论持续受到紫外 (UV) 发散和重叠子发散的挑战。在这项工作中，我们在四维时空中构建了一个绝对紫外有限有效场论（EFT）。我们将完整的动力学算子嵌入到从量化的不可逆零几何导出的双指数容量测量中。通过分析扩展精确算子解析，我们证明了一个普遍的宏观原时界限 ($T \ge \tau_0$) 自然出现，通过拓扑收缩在结构上崩溃了高阶 UV 相空间。这在数学上定义了 EFT 的绝对 UV 边界。因此，重叠子图散度被严格识别为由连续近似分析过度平滑离散晶格边界引起的分布伪奇异性。通过严格使用 Bogoliubov-Parasiuk-Hepp-Zimmermann (BPHZ) 协议作为代数映射算子，系统地纠正了这些伪影。

在 4D 中评估量子电动力学，我们获得有限的电子裸质量（$m_0 \约 0.427$ MeV）并导出有限的重正化常数，从而在分析上保留了精确的 Ward-Takahashi 恒等式（$Z_1=Z_2$）。在量子色动力学中，斯拉夫诺夫-泰勒恒等式的精确保留产生了可计算的有限裸强耦合（$\alpha_{s,0} \approx 0.0191$）。该框架生成分析封闭的非微扰施温格-戴森方程，为有限有效场论提供一致、无异常的数学基础，以解决动态手征对称性破缺和质量生成问题。

title: A Linearized Obstruction to the Supersymmetric Extension of Conformal Boundary Conditions in Euclidean Gravity
abstract: Witten's conformal boundary condition \cite{Witten:2018lgb} provides an elliptic boundary-value problem for the finite-boundary perturbative Euclidean gravitational path integral: one fixes the boundary conformal class and the mean curvature, while the trace-free extrinsic curvature is left free as the conjugate response. We show that this perturbative construction admits no half-supersymmetric extension in linearized minimal supergravity. For fixed conformal bosonic data, no half-dimensional gravitino boundary condition (local or pseudodifferential, APS-type included, with any compatible ghost condition at highest-derivative order) closes the full preserved chiral supersymmetry. Supersymmetry first selects the natural local chiral gravitino datum. Acting back on this datum then produces the trace-free extrinsic curvature, precisely the response that the conformal prescription leaves unfixed. The obstruction is therefore not the failure of a particular elliptic ansatz: even the chiral/Robin completion that is LS-elliptic and BRST-compatible at highest-derivative order would impose Dirichlet control on a Neumann response. The obstruction is pointwise in tangential momentum and survives compensating gauge transformations. It is a linearized, highest-derivative obstruction, not a global or nonlinear no-go; nonlinear supercovariant boundary terms may evade it by tying the trace-free extrinsic curvature to gravitino bilinears.
summary:
威滕的共形边界条件 \cite{Witten:2018lgb} 为有限边界微扰欧几里得引力路径积分提供了一个椭圆边值问题：固定边界共形类和平均曲率，而无痕外在曲率作为共轭响应自由。我们表明，这种微扰结构不允许线性化最小超重力中的半超对称扩展。对于固定的共形玻色子数据，没有半维引力边界条件（局部或伪微分，包括 APS 类型，具有最高导数阶的任何兼容鬼条件）关闭完全保留的手性超对称性。超对称首先选择自然的局部手性引力基准。然后对该数据进行反作用，产生无痕迹的外在曲率，这正是适形处方未固定的响应。因此，障碍并不是特定椭圆拟似的失败：即使是 LS 椭圆且在最高导数阶下兼容 BRST 的手性/Robin 完成也会对诺伊曼响应施加狄利克雷控制。

障碍物在切向动量上是逐点的，并且在补偿规范变换中幸存下来。它是线性化的最高导数障碍，而不是全局或非线性障碍；非线性超协变边界项可以通过将无迹外在曲率与引力双线性联系起来来逃避它。

title: Extended Thermodynamics and Renyi Entropy Beyond Fixed Central Charge
abstract: An outstanding problem in the framework of conformal thermodynamics concerns the interpretation of variations in the central charge $C$. In this paper, we construct a novel central-charge Rényi entropy via the Casini-Huerta-Myers (CHM) map by considering thermal CFTs on a hyperbolic cylinder within a fixed charge, field theory volume and central charge potential $(\tilde{Q},\mathcal{V},\mu_C)$ grand canonical ensemble. We demonstrate that the resulting entropy satisfies all four fundamental Rényi entropy inequalities throughout the admissible range of $\mu_C$, establishing its consistency as a genuine Rényi measure. Physically, this novel measure extends conventional Rényi entropy by capturing the degree of entanglement across a statistical ensemble of holographic CFTs with fluctuating degrees of freedom. Furthermore, our conformal thermodynamic analysis of near-extremal configurations reveals that residual entropy arises from the central charge sector rather than thermal excitations. The mass gap that separates the extremal state and the first thermal excitation introduces a characteristic temperature scale $\tilde{T}_*$, which translates via the CHM map into a distinguished characteristic Rényi index $n_*$. Crucially, we propose that $n_*$ separates the theory space into two qualitatively distinct statistical regimes: a dominant-theory regime ($n > n_*$) governed by the most probable CFT realizations, and a multi-theory regime ($n < n_*$) where a broader spectrum of fluctuating theories and higher-energy modular excitations becomes increasingly relevant.
summary:
共形热力学框架中的一个突出问题涉及中心电荷 $C$ 变化的解释。在本文中，我们通过 Casini-Huerta-Myers (CHM) 图构建了一种新颖的中心电荷 Rényi 熵，考虑了固定电荷内双曲圆柱上的热 CFT、场论体积和中心电荷势 $(\tilde{Q},\mathcal{V},\mu_C)$ 大正则系综。我们证明，所得的熵在 $\mu_C$ 的允许范围内满足所有四个基本 Rényi 熵不等式，从而确立了其作为真正的 Rényi 度量的一致性。从物理上讲，这种新颖的测量方法通过捕获具有波动自由度的全息 CFT 统计集合中的纠缠程度，扩展了传统的 Rényi 熵。此外，我们对近极值构型的共形热力学分析表明，残余熵来自中心电荷区而不是热激发。

分离极值状态和第一热激发的质量间隙引入了特征温标 $\tilde{T}_*$，它通过 CHM 图转换为显着的特征 Rényi 指数 $n_*$。至关重要的是，我们提出 $n_*$ 将理论空间分为两个性质不同的统计体系：由最可能的 CFT 实现控制的主导理论体系 ($n > n_*$) 和多理论体系 ($n < n_*$)，其中更广泛的波动理论和更高能量的模块化激励变得越来越相关。

title: On background fields and a cutoff in sigma models
abstract: In this paper, using the example of a two-dimensional nonlinear sigma model with the Heisenberg group, we compare two variants of chiral field decomposition into a background part and a fluctuation. It is shown that only one of these methods is consistent with the construction of the generating functional by introducing a background field. Furthermore, we perform a one-loop renormalization of the quantum action, calculate power-law singularities in the two-loop approximation, and consider transition to an extended classical action. Finally, we study the consistency of the cutoff with special functional relations within the framework of the background field method.
summary: 在本文中，使用海森堡群的二维非线性 sigma 模型的示例，我们比较了手性场分解为背景部分和波动的两种变体。结果表明，这些方法中只有一种与引入背景场构建生成泛函是一致的。此外，我们对量子作用进行单循环重整化，计算二循环近似中的幂律奇点，并考虑向扩展经典作用的过渡。最后，我们在背景场方法的框架内研究了具有特殊函数关系的截断的一致性。

title: Bounds on nonlinear electrodynamics via resummed relative entropy
abstract: We investigate nonlinear electrodynamic effective field theories (EFTs) through the relative entropy evaluated in suitable background electromagnetic fields. In this setup, the relative entropy encodes information about the infinite tower of higher-dimensional operators and provides a systematic probe of nonlinear EFT effects. We study these features in fermionic QED, scalar QED, and Dirac-Born-Infeld theory using perturbative analyses, resummation techniques such as Borel--Laplace resummation, and non-perturbative approaches including the Schwinger proper-time method. In the weak-coupling regime, we show that the non-negativity of the perturbative relative entropy imposes sign constraints on finite truncations of higher-dimensional operators, generalizing familiar positivity bounds on leading EFT coefficients. We further show that violations of non-negativity in the strong-coupling regime admit qualitatively different interpretations depending on the framework: perturbatively analyzed violations diagnose the breakdown of the truncated EFT expansion, whereas violations in resummed or genuinely non-perturbative relative entropy signal physical instabilities of the system, such as the Schwinger effect. Extending the analysis to broader classes of UV completions, including theories with factorial or power-law growth of EFT coefficients, we derive general constraints on nonlinear electrodynamic EFT effects from the non-negativity of the resummed relative entropy. Our results suggest that relative entropy provides a unified diagnostic of perturbative consistency and non-perturbative stability in nonlinear EFTs.
summary:
我们通过在适当的背景电磁场中评估的相对熵来研究非线性电动有效场理论（EFT）。在此设置中，相对熵对有关高维算子的无限塔的信息进行编码，并提供非线性 EFT 效应的系统探测。我们使用微扰分析、Borel-Laplace 恢复等恢复技术以及包括 Schwinger 原时方法在内的非微扰方法来研究费米子 QED、标量 QED 和 Dirac-Born-Infeld 理论中的这些特征。在弱耦合机制中，我们证明了微扰相对熵的非负性对高维算子的有限截断施加了符号约束，从而概括了领先 EFT 系数的熟悉的正性界限。

我们进一步表明，在强耦合机制中，违反非负性的行为会根据框架的不同而产生不同的解释：扰动分析的违反行为诊断出截断的 EFT 扩张的崩溃，而恢复或真正非扰动相对熵的违反行为则表明系统的物理不稳定性，例如施温格效应。将分析扩展到更广泛的 UV 完成类别，包括 EFT 系数的阶乘或幂律增长理论，我们从恢复相对熵的非负性推导出非线性电动 EFT 效应的一般约束。我们的结果表明，相对熵为非线性 EFT 中的微扰一致性和非微扰稳定性提供了统一的诊断。

title: NLO Angular Impulse and Leading Singularities to all orders in spin for Kerr Black Holes
abstract: We compute the next-to-leading order (NLO) angular impulse (spin kick) in the scattering of Kerr black holes using the Kosower--Maybee--O'Connell (KMOC) formalism. Our approach is based on on-shell scattering amplitudes and leading singularities, allowing for a direct extraction of classical observables from quantum amplitudes. We derive compact expressions for the spin-dependent angular impulse valid to all orders in the spin variables at the integrand level, and show that these results reduce to known expressions in the appropriate limits. We perform detailed consistency checks: the conservative result preserves both the covariant spin supplementary condition and the spin magnitude through 2PM order, and the quadratic-in-spin conservative result agrees with existing radial-action results after translating between the direct KMOC spin kick and the radial-action observable. In addition, we extract the corresponding non-relativistic gravitational potential from the triangle leading singularities, obtaining a representation that resums spin effects and reproduces the known spin-orbit interaction at linear order. Our results provide further evidence for the efficiency of amplitude-based methods in classical gravitational dynamics, and highlight the KMOC formalism as a powerful framework for computing spin-dependent observables in binary black hole scattering.
summary:
我们使用 Kosower-Maybee-O'Connell (KMOC) 形式计算克尔黑洞散射中的次前导阶 (NLO) 角脉冲（自旋踢）。我们的方法基于壳上散射振幅和领先奇点，允许从量子振幅中直接提取经典可观测量。我们推导了自旋相关角脉冲的紧凑表达式，该表达式对被积函数级别的自旋变量中的所有阶次都有效，并表明这些结果在适当的限制下简化为已知表达式。我们进行详细的一致性检查：保守结果通过 2PM 阶保留了协变自旋补充条件和自旋幅度，并且在直接 KMOC 自旋踢和径向作用可观测量之间转换后，二次自旋保守结果与现有的径向作用结果一致。此外，我们从三角形引导奇点中提取相应的非相对论引力势，获得恢复自旋效应并以线性顺序再现已知自旋轨道相互作用的表示。

我们的结果为经典引力动力学中基于振幅的方法的效率提供了进一步的证据，并强调 KMOC 形式主义作为计算二元黑洞散射中自旋相关可观测量的强大框架。

title: Geometric and Statistical Thermo Field Dynamics in de Sitter Spacetime
abstract: The dynamics of a massive scalar field non-minimally coupled to gravity in an expanding de Sitter universe are investigated. It is shown that a comoving observer identifies the Bunch--Davies state as the vacuum, whereas a static observer perceives the same state as a thermal bath at the Gibbons--Hawking temperature. Motivated by this observer dependence, a thermal formulation based on Thermo Field Dynamics is developed by combining the geometric doubling associated with the cosmological horizon with the statistical doubling induced by a intrinsec thermal bath. The resulting construction reveals that the doubling procedure is not merely a mathematical artifact, but rather a manifestation of the global causal structure of spacetime together with finite-temperature effects. The temporal evolution of the Bogoliubov angle is analyzed and the corresponding particle number densities are evaluated in both comoving and static frames. In the radiation limit, the comoving number density remains conserved, providing a thermodynamic evolution consistent with that of the Cosmic Microwave Background, whereas in the static frame finite-temperature effects sti\-mulate Parker particle creation. For massive and non-minimally coupled fields, the interplay between geometric and statistical temperatures gives rise to a characteristic thermal scale and a nontrivial dependence on the initial conditions. These results provide a unified framework for describing quantum fields in de Sitter spacetime in the presence of both apparent horizon-induced and intrinsec thermal effects.
summary:
研究了膨胀德西特宇宙中与重力非最小耦合的大质量标量场的动力学。结果表明，同动观察者将邦奇-戴维斯状态识别为真空，而静态观察者将相同的状态视为吉本斯-霍金温度下的热浴。在这种观察者依赖性的推动下，通过将与宇宙视界相关的几何倍增与由本质秒热浴引起的统计倍增相结合，开发了一种基于热场动力学的热公式。由此产生的结构表明，倍增过程不仅仅是一个数学产物，而是时空全局因果结构与有限温度效应的体现。分析了 Bogoliubov 角的时间演化，并在共动坐标系和静态坐标系中评估了相应的粒子数密度。在辐射极限下，共动数密度保持守恒，提供与宇宙微波背景一致的热力学演化，而在静态框架中，有限温度效应刺激帕克粒子的产生。

对于大规模和非最小耦合场，几何温度和统计温度之间的相互作用产生了特征热尺度和对初始条件的重要依赖性。这些结果提供了一个统一的框架，用于描述德西特时空中存在明显视界引起的热效应和固有热效应的情况下的量子场。

title: Microscopic entropy of de Sitter spacetime and entropic solution to the old cosmological constant problem
abstract: We study the role of Weyl symmetry breaking in conformal gravity and the residual scale symmetry of Einstein gravity. The corresponding action is characterized by a dimensionless coupling $\alpha$, determined by the ratio between the de Sitter and Planck scales. We show that this quantity admits a natural interpretation as the Bekenstein-Hawking entropy of de Sitter spacetime. Combining ideas from the functional renormalization group, holography, and emergent gravity, we propose a microscopic interpretation of $\alpha$ as a measure of the degrees of freedom associated with the de Sitter horizon. In this framework, the renormalization group flow of $\alpha(k)$ encodes the scale dependence of these microscopic degrees of freedom. Requiring this flow to be monotonically increasing toward the infrared leads to a cosmological constant of the same order as the observed one, suggesting an entropic solution to the old cosmological constant problem. This remarkably small value can therefore be understood as a direct consequence of the extraordinarily large number of degrees of freedom in our de Sitter universe.
summary: 我们研究了共形引力中外尔对称性破缺的作用以及爱因斯坦引力的剩余尺度对称性。相应的作用以无量纲耦合 $\alpha$ 为特征，由德西特尺度和普朗克尺度之间的比率确定。我们证明这个量可以被自然地解释为德西特时空的贝肯斯坦-霍金熵。结合函数重正化群、全息术和涌现引力的思想，我们提出了 $\alpha$ 的微观解释，作为与德西特视界相关的自由度的度量。在这个框架中，$\alpha(k)$的重正化群流编码了这些微观自由度的尺度依赖性。要求该流向红外方向单调增加会导致宇宙学常数与观测到的宇宙学常数相同，这表明对旧宇宙学常数问题的熵解决方案。因此，这个非常小的值可以被理解为我们德西特宇宙中异常大量的自由度的直接结果。

title: One-loop contributions in Lorentz-violating scalar QED with nonminimal coupling
abstract: In the context of pertubative aspects of Lorentz-violating theories, we study the divergent one-loop two-point functions of a Lorentz-violating (LV) extension of scalar QED containing a dimension-five CPT-odd nonminimal coupling. The model is defined through a generalized covariant derivative involving a constant background vector and the dual electromagnetic field strength. After expanding the action, we derive the full set of vertices relevant for the photon and scalar self-energies, including the mixed minimal-nonminimal seagull interaction diagram required by the gauge invariance. Using dimensional regularization, we compute the divergent parts of the vacuum polarization and scalar self-energy. The complete photon two-point function is shown to be transverse since the mass-dependent pieces generated by the mixed and purely nonminimal bubble graphs cancel against the corresponding seagull graphs, leaving higher-derivative CPT-odd and CPT-even LV gauge counterterms. The scalar self-energy generates LV kinetic and higher-derivative counterterms. The calculation confirms that gauge invariance is preserved, while the nonminimal interaction should be understood within an effective-field-theory expansion.
summary:
在洛伦兹破坏理论的微扰方面，我们研究了包含五维 CPT 奇非最小耦合的标量 QED 的洛伦兹破坏 (LV) 扩展的发散单环两点函数。该模型是通过涉及恒定背景矢量和对偶电磁场强度的广义协变导数来定义的。扩展作用后，我们得出与光子和标量自能相关的全套顶点，包括规范不变性所需的混合最小-非最小海鸥相互作用图。使用维度正则化，我们计算真空极化和标量自能的发散部分。完整的光子两点函数显示为横向的，因为由混合和纯非最小气泡图生成的质量相关部分与相应的海鸥图相抵消，留下更高导数的 CPT 奇数和 CPT 偶数 LV 规范反项。标量自能产生 LV 动能和高导数反项。

计算证实规范不变性得以保留，而非最小相互作用应该在有效场论扩展中被理解。

title: Semiclassical decay of de Sitter space into black holes with vortex-deformed horizons
abstract: We study the decay of de Sitter space into black holes whose horizons are dressed by BPS vortices of a $\mathrm{CP}^1$ action. The process is mediated by a regular Euclidean instanton obtained as a vortex-deformed generalization of the Nariai instanton. Its Euclidean geometry has the form $S^2\times\Sigma$, where $\Sigma$ is a compact surface whose geometry is shaped by the vortex configuration. The resulting decay rates are controlled by a discrete topological charge, showing that matter vortices open a new topologically organized family of decay channels for de Sitter space.
summary: 我们研究德西特空间衰变为黑洞，黑洞的视界被 $\mathrm{CP}^1$ 作用的 BPS 涡旋所修饰。该过程由作为 Nariai 瞬子的涡旋变形推广而获得的常规欧几里得瞬子介导。其欧几里得几何形状为 $S^2\times\Sigma$，其中 $\Sigma$ 是一个紧凑表面，其几何形状由涡旋配置决定。由此产生的衰变率由离散的拓扑电荷控制，表明物质涡旋为德西特空间打开了一个新的拓扑组织的衰变通道族。

title: Gauge invariant generalizations of the Proca equation and the Yang-Mills-Proca equation
abstract: The Proca equations (1936) are used in quantum field theory to describe vector bosons (spin 1) with a nonzero mass. The Proca equations are not gauge invariant. In contrast to Stueckelberg's approach (1938), this article presents a gauge invariant generalization of the Proca equation by introducing an additional vector field into the Proca equation. The results are extended to the Yang-Mills-Proca equations, leading to equations with non-Abelian gauge symmetry.
summary: Proca 方程 (1936) 在量子场论中用于描述具有非零质量的矢量玻色子（自旋 1）。 Proca 方程不是规范不变的。与 Stueckelberg 的方法 (1938) 相比，本文通过在 Proca 方程中引入额外的向量场，提出了 Proca 方程的规范不变推广。结果被扩展到 Yang-Mills-Proca 方程，从而得到具有非阿贝尔规范对称性的方程。

title: Poisson structures of deformed $W$-algebras and classical $W$-algebras
abstract: In this paper, we explain how classical $W$-algebras can be obtained as limits of $q$-deformed $W$-algebras in type $A$. To this end, we give a detailed examination of the construction of deformed $W$-algebras via Hamiltonian reduction of deformed affine Poisson algebras. We first derive an affine Poisson vertex algebra (PVA) from the Poisson structure of the deformed affine Poisson algebra. This construction identifies a specific set of generators of the deformed $W$-algebra with generators of the classical $W$-algebra.
summary: 在本文中，我们解释了如何获得经典 $W$ 代数作为 $A$ 类型中 $q$ 变形 $W$ 代数的极限。为此，我们通过变形仿射泊松代数的哈密顿约简来详细检查变形$W$-代数的构造。我们首先从变形仿射泊松代数的泊松结构导出仿射泊松顶点代数（PVA）。该结构将变形 $W$ 代数的生成器与经典 $W$ 代数的生成器识别为一组特定的生成器。

title: Measuring a quantum system without problems
abstract: The process of measuring quantum observables has been plagued, since the inception of quantum mechanics, by the so-called measurement problem: it is impossible to read a definite outcome on a quantum scale. In this paper, we overcome this century-old problem by proving the existence of a measurement scheme in which the probe undergoes a quantum-to-classical transition, all the while satisfying the requirements of measurements in standard quantum mechanics.
summary: 自量子力学诞生以来，测量量子可观测量的过程一直受到所谓的测量问题的困扰：不可能在量子尺度上读取明确的结果。在本文中，我们通过证明一种测量方案的存在来克服这个百年难题，在该方案中探针经历量子到经典的转变，同时满足标准量子力学的测量要求。

title: Integrating Polchinski's equation by convergent binary tree expansions
abstract: We give a solution to Polchinski's equation for the Wilsonian effective action in terms of an expansion in binary trees, and prove that this expansion converges in fermionic field theories, provided the fermionic covariance has finite determinant and decay constants. A novel element of the proof are detailed combinatorial estimates for the number of leaf trees associated to binary trees. The method can be used on standard models of fermionic quantum field theory and quantum statistical mechanics.
summary: 我们以二叉树展开的形式给出了威尔逊有效作用的波尔钦斯基方程的解，并证明了这种展开在费米子场论中收敛，只要费米子协方差具有有限的行列式和衰减常数。该证明的一个新颖元素是对与二叉树相关的叶树数量的详细组合估计。该方法可用于费米子量子场论和量子统计力学的标准模型。

title: Heat Kernel and Resurgence
abstract: We study the resurgent structure of short-time heat kernel asymptotics from the viewpoint of Picard-Lefschetz theory. For a real analytic Riemannian manifold, we show the heat kernel admits a 1-Gevrey small-time expansion whose Borel transform detects complex-geometric data beyond the real geodesic sector. We formulate an infinite-dimensional Picard-Lefschetz problem of Morse-Floer type for the holomorphic energy functional on the complexified path space, and propose a heat-kernel analogue of the Picard-Lefschetz/Alien correspondence. In this framework, pointed alien operators acting on the asymptotic expansion associated with the real geodesic are predicted to produce the formal heat-kernel sectors associated with other holomorphic geodesics, with coefficients given by signed counts of connecting trajectories of the Morse flow. We perform a confirming test of this proposal on the hyperbolic plane $H^2$.
summary: 我们从Picard-Lefschetz理论的角度研究了短时热核渐近的复活结构。对于真实的解析黎曼流形，我们证明热核允许 1-Gevrey 小时间展开，其 Borel 变换可检测超出真实测地线扇区的复杂几何数据。我们针对复杂路径空间上的全纯能量泛函制定了 Morse-Floer 型无限维 Picard-Lefschetz 问题，并提出了 Picard-Lefschetz/Alien 对应的热核模拟。在此框架中，预测作用于与真实测地线相关的渐近膨胀的指向外算子将产生与其他全纯测地线相关的形式热核扇区，其系数由莫尔斯流连接轨迹的有符号计数给出。我们在双曲平面 $H^2$ 上对该提议进行了验证测试。

title: The asymmetric five vertex model on a rectangle
abstract: We derive a determinantal expression for the inhomogeneous asymmetric five vertex model in a rectangular geometry with arbitrary boundary conditions at the bottom and top. Standard non-intersecting lattice path, or free fermion, approaches are not applicable and the determinantal form thus is not immediate.
summary: 我们推导出底部和顶部具有任意边界条件的矩形几何中非齐次不对称五顶点模型的行列式。标准的非相交晶格路径或自由费米子方法不适用，因此行列式不是直接的。

title: Electromagnetic Characterization of Magnetic Bar: Case of Square Cross-Section Shape
abstract: This paper presents a complete two-dimensional theoretical model for the electromagnetic behavior of square-section solid magnetic bars under sinusoidal loading. Through the application of Maxwell's equations within a Cartesian coordinate system and the integration of complex permeability, exact mathematical expressions are derived for mutual impedance, internal magnetic fields, flux, and core losses. Hyperbolic functions are utilized to separate the variables, enabling the accurate representation of edge flux accumulation and the 2D skin effect. In addition to mathematically decoupling eddy current and hysteresis losses, this formulation yields a new apparent permeability parameter. This parameter establishes a fast, reliable method for magnetic steel characterization that bypasses the extensive processing times associated with Finite Element Analysis (FEA). Numerical results over 1 Hz-1 MHz show the apparent relative permeability decreasing from 500 to 300 and a characteristic resistance peak near 700 kHz, marking the transition from volumetric to surface-dominated loss regimes.
summary: 本文提出了正弦载荷下方形截面实心磁棒电磁行为的完整二维理论模型。通过在笛卡尔坐标系中应用麦克斯韦方程组以及复磁导率的积分，可以导出互阻抗、内部磁场、磁通和磁芯损耗的精确数学表达式。利用双曲函数来分离变量，从而能够准确表示边缘通量累积和二维趋肤效应。除了在数学上解耦涡流和磁滞损耗之外，该公式还产生了新的表观磁导率参数。该参数建立了一种快速、可靠的磁钢表征方法，避免了与有限元分析 (FEA) 相关的大量处理时间。 1 Hz-1 MHz 范围内的数值结果显示，表观相对磁导率从 500 下降到 300，并且在 700 kHz 附近出现特征电阻峰值，标志着从体积主导损耗状态向表面主导损耗状态的转变。

title: Level lines of the Gaussian free field and $c=1$ degenerate conformal blocks
abstract: We consider Gaussian free field (GFF) on simply connected domains with piecewise constant Dirichlet boundary data. We show that the crossing probabilities for its level lines are determined by conformal blocks of primary fields in a conformal field theory (CFT) with central charge $c = 1$ which are degenerate at each insertion. Alternatively, the crossing probabilities are ratios of explicit partition functions of fused multiple $\mathrm{SLE}_4$ curves, which can be written in terms of fused Specht polynomials introduced recently by Lafay, Peltola, & Roussillon in a representation-theoretic context. We also prove that for the metric graph GFF introduced by Lupu, with appropriate boundary conditions, the crossing probabilities for its level sets converge in the scaling limit to our formulas. In particular, the geometry of the level-set percolation for both the continuum GFF and the metric graph GFF has a CFT description in terms of the aforementioned $c=1$ conformal blocks, which are linearly independent and solve the Belavin-Polyakov-Zamolodchikov (BPZ) PDEs of arbitrary orders. Interestingly, not all combinatorial boundary conditions are amenable for the GFF models -- while the CFT contains conformal blocks of primary fields labeled by generalized Dyck paths (i.e., semi-standard Young tableaux), the ones appearing in the above models satisfy specific monotonicity constraints.
summary:
我们考虑具有分段常数狄利克雷边界数据的简单连通域上的高斯自由场（GFF）。我们证明，其水平线的交叉概率是由共形场论（CFT）中的主场共形块决定的，中心电荷 $c = 1$，在每次插入时都会退化。或者，交叉概率是融合多条 $\mathrm{SLE}_4$ 曲线的显式配分函数的比率，可以用 Lafay、Peltola 和 Roussillon 最近在表示理论背景下引入的融合 Specht 多项式来编写。我们还证明，对于 Lupu 引入的度量图 GFF，在适当的边界条件下，其水平集的交叉概率在我们的公式的缩放极限内收敛。特别是，连续统 GFF 和度量图 GFF 的水平集渗滤的几何结构具有根据上述 $c=1$ 共形块的 CFT 描述，这些共形块是线性独立的，并求解任意阶的 Belavin-Polyakov-Zamolodchikov (BPZ) PDE。

有趣的是，并非所有组合边界条件都适合 GFF 模型——虽然 CFT 包含由广义 Dyck 路径（即半标准 Young tableaux）标记的主要场的共形块，但上述模型中出现的边界条件满足特定的单调性约束。

title: Singular barriers and quartic integrability breaking in the TTW system
abstract: We study a symmetric quartic deformation of the classical ($k=1$) Tempesta-Turbiner-Winternitz system, $H=\frac{1}{2}\left(P_X^2+P_Y^2\right)+X^2+Y^2 +\frac{\gamma}{X^2}+\frac{\gamma}{Y^2} +\kappa \,X^2Y^2 $, which interpolates between the maximally superintegrable Smorodinsky-Winternitz oscillator and the quartically coupled Contopoulos oscillator. For $\gamma>0$, the inverse-square terms generate impenetrable walls at ($X=0$) and ($Y=0$), splitting configuration space into invariant sectors. We show that, for sufficiently small nonzero $\kappa$, resonant averaging produces a phase-locked periodic orbit whose fixed-energy reduced Poincaré map has no unit characteristic multiplier. The Poincaré's nonintegrability criterion then excludes a second independent $C^1$ first integral in any invariant neighbourhood of this orbit. The result is local in phase space and perturbative in $\kappa$. At finite coupling, Poincaré sections and finite-time Lyapunov maps show the breakup of invariant curves and the growth of chaotic layers with increasing energy and quartic coupling. Comparison with the barrier-free Contopoulos limit shows that the singular TTW walls suppress phase-space transport without restoring integrability.
summary:
我们研究经典 ($k=1$) Tempesta-Turbiner-Winternitz 系统的对称四次变形，$H=\frac{1}{2}\left(P_X^2+P_Y^2\right)+X^2+Y^2 +\frac{\gamma}{X^2}+\frac{\gamma}{Y^2} +\kappa \,X^2Y^2 $，它在最大超可积 Smorodinsky-Winternitz 振荡器和四次耦合 Contopoulos 振荡器。对于 $\gamma>0$，平方反比项在 ($X=0$) 和 ($Y=0$) 处生成不可穿透的墙，将配置空间分成不变的扇区。我们证明，对于足够小的非零$\kappa$，共振平均产生一个锁相周期轨道，其固定能量简化庞加莱图没有单位特征乘数。然后，庞加莱的不可积性准则排除了该轨道的任何不变邻域中的第二个独立的 $C^1$ 第一个积分。结果在相空间中是局部的，在 $\kappa$ 中是扰动的。在有限耦合下，庞加莱截面和有限时间李亚普诺夫图显示了随着能量和四次耦合的增加，不变曲线的破裂和混沌层的增长。

与无障碍 Contopoulos 极限的比较表明，奇异 TTW 壁抑制了相空间传输而不恢复可积性。

title: Localized oscillation of an Euler--Bernoulli beam with time-varying parameters on a visco-elastic foundation: asymptotics, adiabatic invariant, and equivalent Hamiltonian system
abstract: We consider localized oscillation of an Euler--Bernoulli beam on a visco-elastic foundation coupled to a damped discrete oscillator. All parameters of the system independently vary in time in a slow manner. For the conservative case, we use three various analytic approaches. Namely, these are asymptotics, the method based on the adiabatic invariance of the action of a trapped wave, and the consideration of the equivalent Hamiltonian system. All approaches result in the same formula for the amplitude of oscillation. In the dissipative case, we obtain the amplitude of oscillation only utilizing the asymptotic approach.
summary: 我们考虑与阻尼离散振荡器耦合的粘弹性基础上欧拉-伯努利梁的局部振荡。系统的所有参数随时间独立地缓慢变化。对于保守的情况，我们使用三种不同的分析方法。即，这些是渐近法、基于陷波作用的绝热不变性的方法以及对等效哈密顿系统的考虑。所有方法都会得出相同的振荡幅度公式。在耗散情况下，我们仅利用渐近方法获得振荡幅度。

title: Minimum Virtual Proper Time and Finite Mass--Charge Matching in QED
abstract: We formulate a finite-proper-time version of QED defined by a gauge-covariant generating functional in which every Schwinger proper-time integral has a physical lower endpoint $s_0=\Lambda^{-2}$ that is not removed. Closed fermion loops are defined by the gauge-covariant heat-kernel determinant, and open fermion lines are obtained by functional differentiation of the same finite-proper-time open-line kernel. The Ward--Takahashi identity follows exactly from gauge covariance to all orders. The vacuum polarisation is finite and exactly transverse. The on-shell mass relation gives 0.482$$ MeV for an illustrative choice $\Lambda=13\$ TeV at one loop. The free finite-proper-time propagators are proved to satisfy Osterwalder--Schrader reflection positivity, with a positive Kallen--Lehmann spectral function and no additional ghost states. The on-shell residue $Z_2>0$ at one loop confirms unitarity of the fermion sector, and the perturbative spectral function of the dressed propagator is positive. A worldline bound $Q\le0$ gives fixed-order Euclidean UV finiteness. The one-loop vertex correction gives a finite anomalous magnetic moment, a calculable $O(m^2/\Lambda^2)$ prediction absent in standard QED.
summary:
我们制定了由规范协变生成函数定义的 QED 的有限本征时间版本，其中每个施温格本征时间积分都有一个未删除的物理下端点 $s_0=\Lambda^{-2}$。闭合费米子环由规范协变热核行列式定义，开放费米子线通过相同有限本征时间开线核的函数微分获得。 Ward--Takahashi 恒等式完全遵循规范协方差到所有阶数。真空极化是有限的并且完全是横向的。对于一个循环中的示例性选择 $\Lambda=13\$ TeV，壳上质量关系给出 0.482$$ MeV。证明了自由有限本征时间传播子满足Osterwalder-Schrader反射正性，具有正的Kallen-Lehmann谱函数并且没有附加鬼态。一个循环处的壳上留数 $Z_2>0$ 证实了费米子扇区的幺正性，并且修饰后的传播器的微扰谱函数为正。世界线边界 $Q\le0$ 给出定阶欧几里德 UV 有限性。

单环顶点校正给出了有限的反常磁矩，这是标准 QED 中不存在的可计算 $O(m^2/\Lambda^2)$ 预测。

title: Why Hadamard states?
abstract: In quantum field theory on curved spacetime, and in locally-covariant quantum field theory, the Hadamard condition is often presented as a necessary condition on 'physically reasonable' states of the quantum field, and plays a central role in many theoretical and foundational applications - ranging from proofs of the renormalizability of Wick polynomials to derivations of the Hawking temperature. Yet despite this, the philosophical and foundational underpinnings of the Hadamard condition remain murky. I critically discuss existing motivations for the Hadamard condition in the literature, before arguing in favour of an alternative justification for the Hadamard condition, according to which it is best understood as a necessary and sufficient condition for the existence of a well-defined operator product on a sufficiently large space of observables of the quantum field, satisfying a variety of further conditions (thus proving a converse to a result which was already discussed in this context). This clarifies the role and status of the Hadamard condition, including its relationship to the equivalence principle, to well-definedness of physical quantities such as Wick polynomials and the expectation value of the stress-energy operator, and the sense in which Hadamard states are 'vacuum-like'.
summary:
在弯曲时空的量子场论和局域协变量子场论中，哈达玛条件通常被视为量子场“物理合理”状态的必要条件，并在许多理论和基础应用中发挥着核心作用——从威克多项式的重正化性证明到霍金温度的推导。然而尽管如此，哈达玛条件的哲学和基础基础仍然模糊。在支持哈达玛条件的另一种论证之前，我批判性地讨论了文献中哈达玛条件的现有动机，根据哈达玛条件，最好将其理解为在足够大的量子场可观测量空间上存在明确定义的算子乘积的必要和充分条件，满足各种进一步的条件（从而证明与本文中已经讨论的结果相反）。

这阐明了哈达玛条件的作用和地位，包括它与等效原理、物理量（如威克多项式和应力能量算符的期望值）的明确定义的关系，以及哈达玛状态“类真空”的含义。

title: Compatible Lie conformal bialgebras
abstract: We introduce and study compatible Lie conformal bialgebras as conformal counterparts of compatible Lie bialgebras. Such a structure consists of two compatible Lie conformal brackets and two compatible conformal cobrackets on the same $\C[\partial]$-module, and every simultaneous linear combination of them is again a Lie conformal bialgebra. We develop representations and matched pairs for compatible Lie conformal algebras, introduce compatible Lie conformal coalgebras, and establish their duality through the conformal dual in the finite case. For $\C[\p]$-modules that are free of finite rank, we prove the equivalence among compatible Lie conformal bialgebras, standard compatible conformal Manin triples and matched pairs. In the coboundary case, we characterize the tensors $r$ that determine compatible Lie conformal bialgebras. The characterization requires the symmetric part of $r$ to be invariant with respect to both brackets and three conformal Yang--Baxter conditions to hold. The first two conditions correspond to the two brackets separately, whereas the third is the compatible conformal Yang--Baxter condition. For comparison, we introduce the compatible conformal classical Yang--Baxter equation (CYBE) and show that each of its solutions satisfies these three conditions, while the converse fails. One explicit example shows that the first two conditions do not imply the third. Another shows that all three conformal Yang-Baxter conditions may hold even though $r$ is not a solution of compatible conformal CYBE.
summary:
我们引入并研究相容李双代数作为相容李双代数的共形对应物。这样的结构由同一个 $\C[\partial]$ 模块上的两个兼容的李共形括号和两个兼容的共角括号组成，并且它们的每个同时线性组合又是一个李共形双代数。我们开发了兼容李共形代数的表示和匹配对，引入了兼容李共形代数，并通过有限情况下的共形对偶建立了它们的对偶性。对于无有限秩的$\C[\p]$-模，我们证明了兼容李共形双代数、标准兼容共形马宁三元组和匹配对之间的等价性。在共边界情况下，我们表征确定兼容李共形双代数的张量 $r$。表征要求 $r$ 的对称部分对于两个括号和三个共形 Yang-Baxter 条件保持不变。前两个条件分别对应于两个括号，而第三个条件是兼容的共形Yang-Baxter条件。

为了进行比较，我们引入了兼容的共形经典Yang--Baxter方程（CYBE），并表明它的每个解都满足这三个条件，而反之则失败。一个明确的例子表明前两个条件并不意味着第三个条件。另一项表明，即使 $r$ 不是兼容的共形 CYBE 的解，所有三个共形 Yang-Baxter 条件也可能成立。

title: Statistical Physics of Planar Carroll Systems
abstract: In this article, we define and study the statistical physics of planar Carrollian systems. While it has been shown recently that, for general dimensions, the Carroll limit of Poincaré statistical physics typically does not converge, we show that thanks to the central extensions of the Carroll algebra in the plane, and by considering systems with angular momentum, there exists a well defined notion of planar Carrollian statistical physics. Using Souriau's geometric thermodynamics, we compute the partition function for particles on a uniformly rotating disc, and show that rotation is inevitable for thermal equilibrium of planar Carroll systems, with one of the central charges determining the direction of rotation. We derive thermodynamic quantities in particular entropy, which scales logarithmically with the disc area, and pressure, which follows the two-dimensional ideal gas law. Though all results are obtained from symmetry considerations, we also derive the corresponding effective Hamiltonian.
summary: 在本文中，我们定义并研究了平面卡罗尔系统的统计物理。虽然最近表明，对于一般维度，庞加莱统计物理的卡罗尔极限通常不会收敛，但我们表明，由于卡罗尔代数在平面上的中心扩展，并且通过考虑具有角动量的系统，存在一个明确定义的平面卡罗尔统计物理概念。利用 Souriau 的几何热力学，我们计算了均匀旋转圆盘上粒子的配分函数，并表明旋转对于平面卡罗尔系统的热平衡是不可避免的，其中一个中心电荷决定了旋转方向。我们推导出热力学量，特别是熵（它与圆盘面积呈对数关系）和压力（遵循二维理想气体定律）。尽管所有结果都是从对称性考虑中获得的，但我们还推导了相应的有效哈密顿量。

title: Jacobi exceptional orthogonal polynomials for extended Scarf I potentials with position-dependent mass
abstract: We show that the Scarf I potential problem in a position-dependent mass background of the type $m(\alpha;x) = (1 + \alpha \sin x)^{-2}$, $0<\alpha<1$, can be solved by using a point canonical transformation mapping the corresponding Schr\" odinger equation onto that of the Scarf I potential with constant mass. The inverse point canonical transformation then provides some exactly-solvable rational extensions of the Scarf I potential with positive-dependent mass associated with $X_m$-Jacobi exceptional orthogonal polynomials of type I, II, or III. The Scarf I potential problem with position-dependent mass is shown to exhibit a deformed shape invariance property in a deformed supersymmetric framework. Such a property is also valid for extended potentials of type I and II. The results are illustrated with a simple example.
summary: 我们证明，$m(\alpha;x) = (1 + \alpha \sin x)^{-2}$, $0<\alpha<1$ 类型的位置相关质量背景中的 Scarf I 势问题可以通过使用点正则变换将相应的 Schr\" odinger 方程映射到具有恒定质量的 Scarf I 势的方程来解决。然后，逆点正则变换提供了 Scarf I 势的一些可精确求解的有理扩展：与 I、II 或 III 型的 $X_m$-Jacobi 异常正交多项式相关的正相关质量。位置相关质量的 Scarf I 势问题在变形超对称框架中表现出变形形状不变性，这种性质对于 I 型和 II 型扩展势也有效。

title: Cantor Spectrum via a Reducibility-Duality Bridge for the Mosaic Almost Mathieu Operator
abstract: We study the mosaic Almost Mathieu operator, a quasiperiodic model that naturally admits a singular strip-Jacobi representation. By establishing a duality framework and extending the correspondence between the integrated density of states and the fibered rotation number to this setting, we obtain an effective reduction to $SL(2,\mathbb{R})$ cocycles. As a consequence, combining Aubry duality, reducibility theory, and the Moser--Pöschel argument, we prove that the spectrum is a Cantor set for all noncritical parameters.
summary: 我们研究马赛克Almost Mathieu 算子，这是一种准周期模型，自然地承认奇异条带雅可比表示。通过建立对偶框架并将积分态密度和纤维旋转数之间的对应关系扩展到此设置，我们获得了 $SL(2,\mathbb{R})$ cocycles 的有效减少。因此，结合奥布里对偶性、可约性理论和 Moser-Pöschel 论证，我们证明谱是所有非关键参数的康托集。

title: Which Waveguide Network Realizes a Prescribed Transmission Profile? An Exact Forward Construction
abstract: We introduce an analytically invertible framework for wavefront construction based on the scattering properties of periodic waveguide networks governed by a gauge-shifted Helmholtz operator. By determining the exact transmission coefficients of the network, we express the lattice reactance as a Fourier expansion whose coefficients are analytically mapped onto the underlying graph architecture, allowing the required bond connections, refractive indices, lengths, and gauge phases to be determined directly from a prescribed target transmission coefficient. In contrast to conventional inverse-design approaches, the present formulation provides a closed-form route from desired wave transmission profiles to physically realisable structures. The framework extends naturally from one-dimensional angular filtering to two-dimensional image synthesis, where arbitrary transmitted intensity patterns are reconstructed through exact spectral control of the network scattering response.
summary: 我们引入了一种用于波前构造的分析可逆框架，该框架基于由规范移位亥姆霍兹算子控制的周期性波导网络的散射特性。通过确定网络的精确传输系数，我们将晶格电抗表示为傅里叶展开式，其系数被分析映射到底层图形架构上，从而允许直接从规定的目标传输系数确定所需的键连接、折射率、长度和规格相位。与传统的逆向设计方法相比，本公式提供了从所需的波传输轮廓到物理上可实现的结构的封闭形式路线。该框架自然地从一维角度过滤扩展到二维图像合成，其中通过网络散射响应的精确光谱控制来重建任意透射强度图案。

title: Position-Space Renormalization and Half-Space Truncations in $ϕ^4_4$
abstract: In this paper, we study half-space observables in the massive Euclidean $\phi^4_4$ theory. We prove that the renormalized correlators can be multiplied by half-space truncations without requiring any additional renormalization. More precisely, products with smooth approximations of the half-space indicator converge to well-defined distributional limits, uniformly in the ultraviolet cutoff. The proof relies on a position-space renormalization framework for the Wilson--Polchinski flow equation based on a hierarchy of power-counting spaces adapted to the singularity structure of the correlators. This yields uniform power-counting bounds and Besov--Hölder regularity estimates for the renormalized correlators. As a consequence, the correlators converge as the ultraviolet cutoff tends to infinity, and the convergence takes place in explicitly identified Besov spaces.
summary: 在本文中，我们研究了大规模欧几里得 $\phi^4_4$ 理论中的半空间可观测量。我们证明重整化相关器可以乘以半空间截断，而不需要任何额外的重整化。更准确地说，具有半空间指示器平滑近似的产品收敛到明确定义的分布极限，在紫外线截止范围内均匀一致。该证明依赖于 Wilson-Polchinski 流方程的位置空间重整化框架，该框架基于适应相关器奇点结构的功率计数空间层次结构。这产生了重正化相关器的统一功率计数界限和 Besov-Hölder 正则估计。因此，当紫外线截止趋于无穷大时，相关器会收敛，并且收敛发生在明确识别的贝索夫空间中。

title: Parametric correlations in non-Hermitian quantum chaos: random matrix approach
abstract: Motivated by the surge of interest in statistics of non-Hermitian random matrices as a framework for description of universal characteristics of dissipative chaotic quantum many-body systems, we address the problem of characterizing the parametric correlations of spectral densities. Considering parameter-dependent ensemble of complex Ginibre matrices we derive an explicit, closed-form expression for the parametric number covariance in the systems of symmetry class $\mathbf{A}$ for eigenvalues in a circular domain containing on average a finite number of eigenvalues in the spectral bulk. This behavior is expected to be universal, as further supported by numerical evidence for the real Ginibre ensemble, non-Hermitian Bernoulli Wigner matrices and bi-unitarily invariant ensembles. We also discuss a relation between parametric correlations of spectral densities and the distribution of the so-called eigenvector non-orthogonality factor, which attracted considerable interest in recent years.
summary: 由于人们对非厄米随机矩阵统计作为描述耗散混沌量子多体系统普遍特征的框架的兴趣激增，我们解决了表征谱密度参数相关性的问题。考虑到复杂吉尼伯矩阵的参数相关系综，我们推导出对称类 $\mathbf{A}$ 系统中参数数协方差的显式封闭式表达式，该表达式针对圆形域中的特征值，该圆形域中平均包含有限数量的谱体特征值。这种行为预计将具有普遍性，并得到真实 Ginibre 系综、非厄米特伯努利维格纳矩阵和双酉不变系综的数值证据的进一步支持。我们还讨论了光谱密度的参数相关性与所谓的特征向量非正交因子分布之间的关系，该关系近年来引起了相当大的兴趣。

title: Enhancing quantum processor capabilities during idle times
abstract: We advocate an alternative paradigm to operate quantum computers that utilizes multipartite entanglement generated in dedicated auxiliary systems during idle times. This stored entanglement enhances the future capabilities of the quantum processor, as it can be flexibly used to assist and speed-up computations when needed. We identify classes of multipartite entangled resource states whose computational power are related to their entanglement features, and in turn to the complexity to generate them. During idle times, one can thus continuously work towards generating more and more powerful auxiliary multipartite entangled states. Idle times include both times prior to the start of a computation, but also any step during the execution of an algorithm where parts of the processor are not actively involved. To illustrate our approach, we consider architectures with limited connectivity, e.g. corresponding to a 1D geometry. We show that $d$-dimensional cluster states allow one to flexibly perform multiple long-distance two-qubit gates in parallel, where both the complexity to generate them, as well as the number of achievable gates increases with $d$.
summary: 我们提倡另一种操作量子计算机的范例，该范例利用空闲时间在专用辅助系统中生成的多方纠缠。这种存储的纠缠增强了量子处理器的未来能力，因为它可以在需要时灵活地用于辅助和加速计算。我们识别多部分纠缠资源状态的类别，其计算能力与其纠缠特征相关，进而与生成它们的复杂性相关。在空闲时间，人们可以不断地努力产生越来越强大的辅助多部分纠缠态。空闲时间既包括计算开始之前的时间，也包括算法执行期间处理器部分未主动参与的任何步骤。为了说明我们的方法，我们考虑连接有限的架构，例如对应于一维几何。我们表明，$d$ 维簇状态允许人们灵活地并行执行多个长距离双量子位门，其中生成它们的复杂性以及可实现的门的数量都随着 $d$ 的增加而增加。

title: Hierarchical separation of relaxation timescales from spectral localization bounds
abstract: We investigate the dissipative dynamics of multilevel quantum systems strongly coupled either to a lossy cavity mode or directly to a bosonic environment. By deriving spectral localization bounds, we establish conditions under which strong system-bath coupling gives rise to a hierarchy of population relaxation timescales. Our approach builds on the reaction-coordinate polaron-transform framework. By mapping the original strong-coupling problem onto an effective weakly dissipative model, we analyze the spectrum of the resulting Liouvillian superoperator through localization bounds. For the generalized V model, we find that strong system-bath coupling gives rise to a bright-dark structure in the effective system-bath coupling operator: a single collective mode remains strongly coupled to the environment, while the remaining modes become progressively dark. Consequently, the dynamics separate into fast and slow sectors and, at finite coupling strengths, develop a hierarchy of population relaxation timescales. Numerical simulations based on both secular and non-secular quantum master equations corroborate the emergence of timescale separation and the pronounced slowing down of dissipative dynamics at strong coupling. Our results reveal a general mechanism underlying anomalously slow relaxation in strongly coupled open quantum systems and provide a route for engineering long-lived states through system-environment interactions.
summary: 中文摘要自动翻译失败，请展开查看英文原文。

title: Profiling the Effective Limits of Error Mitigation via Circuit Replication
abstract: Current era quantum computers continue to grow in both capability and capacity. Despite these advancements, errors induced by environmental noise severely limit practical applicability. Current research into error mitigation and correction to bridge the gap between current-era quantum computers and the execution of noise-sensitive workloads. These methods have significant performance and resource overheads, thereby greatly limiting the real-world benefits of their use. Circuit replication, as a naive form of error mitigation, is not new and has largely been ignored given the resource constraints of current quantum hardware. However, its simplicity is attractive as a means to supplement modern methods, reducing the overall performance overhead while still preserving error-mitigation capabilities. In this paper, we profile the effects of simple circuit replication under real-world noise profiles to better establish replication's limits as a supplemental mitigation strategy. Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA) for the Maxcut problem is explored for the analysis. For small graphs, we found that the average inference strength decreases by approximately 21.8% while the average standard deviation decreases by 108.8% compared to 6 replicates. For larger graphs, inference strength decreases by 35.4% while the average standard deviation decreased only 20.5%. Fewer replications did not affect smaller graphs, but degraded inference strength, with comparable benefits to standard deviation in larger graphs. These results show that replication has potential uses as a supplemental mitigation strategy for large-depth, highly variable workloads.
summary:
当前时代的量子计算机在性能和容量方面都在持续增长。尽管取得了这些进步，但环境噪声引起的误差严重限制了实际应用。当前针对错误缓解和纠正的研究，旨在弥合当前时代量子计算机与噪声敏感工作负载执行之间的差距。这些方法具有显着的性能和资源开销，从而极大地限制了它们的使用在现实世界中的好处。电路复制作为一种简单的错误缓解形式并不新鲜，而且考虑到当前量子硬件的资源限制，它在很大程度上被忽视了。然而，作为现代方法的补充，它的简单性很有吸引力，可以降低整体性能开销，同时仍然保留错误缓解功能。在本文中，我们分析了简单电路复制在现实世界噪声曲线下的影响，以更好地确定复制的限制作为补充缓解策略。探讨了 Maxcut 问题的量子近似优化算法（QAOA）进行分析。

对于小图，我们发现与 6 个重复相比，平均推理强度下降了约 21.8%，而平均标准差下降了 108.8%。对于较大的图表，推理强度下降了 35.4%，而平均标准偏差仅下降了 20.5%。较少的重复不会影响较小的图，但会降低推理强度，与较大图中的标准差具有相当的好处。这些结果表明，复制具有作为大深度、高度可变工作负载的补充缓解策略的潜在用途。

title: Schur--Horn bound on field-free molecular orientation at finite temperature
abstract: The maximum field-free orientation attainable from a \emph{thermal} molecular ensemble within a finite rotational subspace has not been characterised analytically. Here we derive a Schur--Horn-type upper bound on the field-free orientation $\avg{\cos\theta}$ achievable by \emph{any} $M$-conserving unitary control acting on a Boltzmann ensemble truncated to rotational levels $J\le\Jmax$. The bound is the sum, over magnetic-quantum-number sectors, of the sorted Boltzmann weights paired with the sorted spectrum of $\cos\theta$; it is purely kinematic, set by temperature, the rotational constant, and $\Jmax$ alone, and interpolates exactly between the zero-temperature subspace eigenvalue and a finite-temperature ceiling fixed by the rotational partition function. Benchmarked on LiH against the analytical $N$-subpulse resonant protocol of Hong \textit{et al.} [Phys.\ Rev.\ Research \textbf{7}, L012049 (2025)], it reveals three regimes: the protocol saturates the bound to within about $1.6\%$ for $T\le\SI{5}{\kelvin}$, loses roughly $10\%$ of its zero-temperature orientation at $T=B/\kB\approx\SI{10.8}{\kelvin}$, and leaves a $10$--$40\%$ gap above $\SI{10}{\kelvin}$. Optimising the subpulse areas and carrier phases within the fixed layout closes only $\approx7\%$ of that gap, the optimal phase offsets vanishing, which localises the dominant loss in the rigidity of the analytic layout rather than in the choice of areas or phases. The bound is a control-independent target for coherent-control design, applies unchanged to any linear polar molecule in a $^1\Sigma^+$ state, and is mapped across the $(\Jmax,T)$ plane.
summary:
有限旋转子空间内的\emph{热}分子系综可实现的最大无场取向尚未得到分析表征。在这里，我们推导出无场方向 $\avg{\cos\theta}$ 上的 Schur--Horn 型上限，可通过作用于截断为旋转水平 $J\le\Jmax$ 的玻尔兹曼系综的 \emph{any} $M$ 守恒酉控制来实现。界限是磁量子数扇区上排序的玻尔兹曼权重与 $\cos\theta$ 的排序频谱配对的总和；它是纯运动学的，由温度、旋转常数和 $\Jmax$ 单独设置，并且在零温度子空间特征值和由旋转配分函数固定的有限温度上限之间精确插值。以 LiH 为基准，以 Hong \textit{et al.} [Phys.\ Rev.\ Research \textbf{7}, L012049 (2025)] 的分析 $N$ 子脉冲谐振协议为基准，它揭示了三种状态：该协议将 $T\le\SI{5}{\kelvin}$ 的界限饱和到约 $1.6\%$ 范围内，损失了大约 $10\%$ 的零温度方向为 $T=B/\kB\approx\SI{10.8}{\kelvin}$，并在 $\SI{10}{\kelvin}$ 上方留下 $10$--$40\%$ 间隙。

优化固定布局内的次脉冲区域和载波相位仅缩小该间隙的$\approx7\%$，最佳相位偏移消失，这将主要损失集中在分析布局的刚性而不是区域或相位的选择中。该界限是相干控制设计的与控制无关的目标，不变地应用于 $^1\Sigma^+$ 状态下的任何线性极性分子，并映射到 $(\Jmax,T)$ 平面。

title: Bounded-depth spacetime lattice surgery for resource-efficient fault-tolerant quantum computation
abstract: Fault-tolerant quantum computing based on lattice surgery requires place-and-route compilation with low spacetime overhead. Routing, in particular, faces a basic tension between suppressing path conflicts through greater spatial allocation and exploiting the time direction to realize ancilla-efficient spacetime routing. Existing approaches do not fully resolve this trade-off while retaining compatibility with inner factory layouts and termination guarantees. Here we introduce double-slice routing, a constant-depth spacetime-routing method that uses two consecutive time slices with a guarantee that its kink-parity correction terminates under both planar and stacked architectures. We numerically benchmark the resulting compiler on Hamiltonian-simulation workloads to show that double-slice routing reduces compilation cost by up to a factor of 2.4 over a single-slice baseline. Compared to projective routing, an existing method that allows an unbounded number of time slices per path, double-slice routing achieves smaller circuit volume with only a marginal execution-time penalty. Combined with a cultivation-compatible mapping optimization, the overall improvement reaches up to 7.5-fold over a naive single-slice compilation baseline. These results identify double-slice routing as a practically useful operating point in lattice-surgery compilation and show the substantial benefit in joint optimization of mapping and routing.
summary:
基于晶格手术的容错量子计算需要低时空开销的布局布线编译。特别是路由，面临着通过更大的空间分配抑制路径冲突和利用时间方向实现辅助高效的时空路由之间的基本张力。现有方法并不能完全解决这种权衡，同时保持与内部工厂布局和终止保证的兼容性。在这里，我们介绍双片路由，这是一种恒定深度的时空路由方法，它使用两个连续的时间片，并保证其扭结奇偶校验校正在平面和堆叠架构下终止。我们在哈密顿模拟工作负载上对生成的编译器进行了数值基准测试，结果表明，与单片基准相比，双片路由可将编译成本降低多达 2.4 倍。与投影路由（允许每条路径有无限数量的时间片）的现有方法相比，双片路由实现了更小的电路体积，并且仅执行边际时间损失。

与培养兼容的映射优化相结合，总体改进达到原始单切片编译基线的 7.5 倍。这些结果将双切片布线确定为晶格手术编译中实际有用的操作点，并显示了映射和布线联合优化的巨大好处。

title: Entanglement-entropy analysis of critical and topological quantum phases in a frustrated spin-1/2 Heisenberg ladder
abstract: We investigate the ground-state phase diagram of a frustrated spin-1/2 Heisenberg ladder in the transverse magnetic field with an anisotropic inter-rung exchange coupling $\alpha$. This bond-anisotropic parameter continuously interpolates among the Ising-like limit $\alpha=0$, the isotropic point $\alpha=1$, and the XY-dominated regime $\alpha \gg 1$. Using density-matrix renormalization group calculations within a matrix-product-state framework, we analyze bipartite entanglement, magnetization, and spin correlations to characterize the emergent quantum phases. We identify six distinct ground-state phases, including rung-singlet, Haldane-like, Tomonaga-Luttinger liquid, canted Ising-ordered, XY-polarized, and ordered ferromagnetic states. While magnetization and local correlations provide a first insight into phase classifications, the finite-size scaling of the entanglement measures offers a more sensitive and unified diagnostics of both gapped and gapless regimes. In the gapless regime, we extract the central charge $c \simeq 1$, confirming Tomonaga-Luttinger liquid behavior, while at the transition between the canted Ising and ferromagnetic phases, we observe $c \simeq 1/2$, consistent with the Ising universality. Finally, we find that both the Haldane-like behavior and the extended critical Tomonaga-Luttinger liquid regime are strongly confined to the vicinity of the isotropic point $\alpha = 1$.
summary:
我们研究了具有各向异性梯级间交换耦合 $\alpha$ 的横向磁场中受挫自旋 1/2 海森堡梯的基态相图。该键各向异性参数在类伊辛极限 $\alpha=0$、各向同性点 $\alpha=1$ 和 XY 主导区域 $\alpha \gg 1$ 之间连续插值。使用矩阵乘积态框架内的密度矩阵重整化群计算，我们分析二分纠缠、磁化和自旋相关性来表征涌现的量子相。我们确定了六种不同的基态相，包括梯级单线态、类霍尔丹态、Tomonaga-Luttinger 液体、倾斜伊辛有序态、XY 极化态和有序铁磁态。虽然磁化强度和局部相关性提供了对相分类的初步了解，但纠缠测量的有限尺寸缩放为有隙和无隙状态提供了更灵敏和统一的诊断。

在无间隙状态下，我们提取了中心电荷 $c \simeq 1$，证实了 Tomonaga-Luttinger 液体行为，而在倾斜伊辛相和铁磁相之间的过渡处，我们观察到 $c \simeq 1/2$，与伊辛普适性一致。最后，我们发现类 Haldane 行为和扩展临界 Tomonaga-Luttinger 液体状态都强烈限制在各向同性点 $\alpha = 1$ 附近。

title: Time-Bin BB84 QKD System Using Indium Phosphide and Silicon Nitride Photonic Integrated Circuits
abstract: We demonstrate a dual-chip InP-SiN photonic QKD system with on-chip pulse generation and reconfigurable decoding, implementing time-bin BB84 with finite-key security against coherent attacks. The system sustains a QBER below 4% and delivers secret keys at kbps rates over 150-250 km of fiber.
summary: 我们展示了双芯片 InP-SiN 光子 QKD 系统，具有片上脉冲生成和可重新配置解码功能，实现了具有有限密钥安全性的时间仓 BB84，可抵御相干攻击。该系统将 QBER 维持在 4% 以下，并在 150-250 公里光纤上以 kbps 速率传送密钥。

title: Quantum Beam-Splitter Cooling and Thermometry in Large Trapped-Ion Crystals
abstract: We propose and characterize a protocol for rapid near-ground state cooling of the center-of-mass (c.m.) mode of a large trapped ion crystal. When the initial mean thermal occupation of the mode $\bar{n}_i$ is small compared to the number of ions $N$, a red sideband drive implements a beam-splitter type SWAP operation between the mode and the collective spin of the $N$ ions, with the latter effectively serving as a quantum harmonic oscillator. Subsequently, a reset of the spins removes the entropy, leading to near-ground state cooling of the c.m. mode. We term this protocol as quantum beam-splitter cooling (QBSC). We analyze the impact of several practical imperfections on the final temperature achievable under QBSC, including finite ion number, off-resonant carrier and blue-sideband contributions, and the impact of the sideband drives arising from spectator modes. In addition, we outline practical strategies to eliminate the carrier drive. Furthermore, we show that measuring the population statistics of the ions at the end of the SWAP operation can enable near-optimal quantum beam-splitter thermometry (QBST), with the classical Fisher information approaching the quantum Fisher information of a thermal state. We discuss the connection of QBSC with continuous sideband cooling and compare QBST with a recently proposed rapid adiabatic passage-based thermometry scheme. Our work constitutes an example of harnessing many-body effects to open new routes to laser cooling and thermometry in large trapped ion crystals.
summary:
我们提出并表征了一种对大型俘获离子晶体的质心（cm）模式进行快速近基态冷却的协议。当模式 $\bar{n}_i$ 的初始平均热占用与离子数量 $N$ 相比较小时，红边带驱动器在模式和 $N$ 离子的集体自旋之间实现分束器类型的交换操作，后者有效地充当量子谐振子。随后，自旋的重置消除了熵，导致厘米的近基态冷却。模式。我们将此协议称为量子分束器冷却 (QBSC)。我们分析了几个实际缺陷对 QBSC 下可达到的最终温度的影响，包括有限离子数、非共振载流子和蓝边带贡献，以及旁观模式产生的边带驱动的影响。此外，我们还概述了消除载波驱动的实用策略。

此外，我们表明，在交换操作结束时测量离子的总体统计数据可以实现接近最佳的量子分束器测温（QBST），经典费希尔信息接近热态的量子费希尔信息。我们讨论了 QBSC 与连续边带冷却的联系，并将 QBST 与最近提出的基于快速绝热通道的测温方案进行了比较。我们的工作是利用多体效应开辟大型离子晶体激光冷却和测温新途径的一个例子。

title: Entanglement engineering in magnomechanical system via cross-Kerr interaction and mechanical parametric amplification
abstract: Quantum entanglement in cavity magnomechanical system has a wide range of applications in modern quantum technologies. In this work, we propose a theoretical scheme to generate and enhance quantum entanglement through cross-Kerr nonlinearity and mechanical parametric amplification (MPA) in a magnomechanical system. Our system is made of a magnonic mode that is simultaneously driving the acoustic phononic and the center-of-mass motion (CMM) phonon in a yttrium iron garnet sphere. The acoustic mode and the center-of-mass mechanical (CMM) mode are weakly coupled via the phonon hopping rate $J_m$. Moreover, the magnonic and phononic modes interact through cross-Kerr interaction, while the phononic mode is additionally driven via a Mechanical Parametric Amplification (MPA). Without the mechanical coupling ($J_m = 0$) and the MPA, the generation of entanglement among the subsystems requires a relatively strong effective cross-Kerr coupling. However, when phonon hopping and MPA are accounted, quantum entanglement can be generated even for weak values of the cross-Kerr coupling strength, revealing the key role of these interactions in the engineering of quantum correlations in our proposal. Furthermore, the related purity of the generated entangled states remains high for the same parameter's regime, revealing that the generated quantum entanglement is established without significantly increasing the mixing of the involved states in the system. Our work suggests how robust and stable quantum correlations can be engineered in magnomechanical structures based on nonlinear interactions. These results are useful for modern quantum applications including quantum information processing, quantum communication, and quantum computational tasks.
summary:
腔磁力系统中的量子纠缠在现代量子技术中具有广泛的应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种理论方案，通过磁力系统中的交叉克尔非线性和机械参量放大（MPA）来生成和增强量子纠缠。我们的系统由声波模式组成，该模式同时驱动钇铁石榴石球中的声学声子和质心运动（CMM）声子。声学模式和质心机械 (CMM) 模式通过声子跳跃率 $J_m$ 弱耦合。此外，声子模式和声子模式通过交叉克尔相互作用相互作用，而声子模式还通过机械参数放大（MPA）驱动。在没有机械耦合（$J_m = 0$）和MPA的情况下，子系统之间纠缠的产生需要相对较强的有效交叉克尔耦合。

然而，当考虑声子跳跃和 MPA 时，即使交叉克尔耦合强度很弱，也可以产生量子纠缠，这揭示了这些相互作用在我们建议中的量子相关工程中的关键作用。此外，对于相同参数的范围，生成的纠缠态的相关纯度仍然很高，这表明生成的量子纠缠是在没有显着增加系统中所涉及状态的混合的情况下建立的。我们的工作表明如何在基于非线性相互作用的磁力力学结构中设计鲁棒且稳定的量子相关性。这些结果对于现代量子应用非常有用，包括量子信息处理、量子通信和量子计算任务。

title: Optimal GHZ-State Distribution in LOSR Quantum Networks via Local Decoding from Information Sets
abstract: Distributing multipartite entanglement is a prerequisite for scalable quantum networks. Networks restricted to local operations and shared randomness (LOSR) avoid the quantum-memory and latency costs associated with the real-time classical communication required by LOCC-based networks. However, when only bipartite sources are available, LOSR networks cannot prepare useful GHZ states. In earlier work, we conjectured that multipartite sources overcome this limitation and supported this claim with a single numerical example. In this work, we prove the conjecture for regular and uniform networks of arbitrary size. By identifying the hyperedges of the network with the coordinates of a linear code, we show that whenever the edges incident to each node form an information set, a fixed collection of local unitaries, namely the local decoders of the code, transforms the source state into an (N)-party GHZ state with fidelity (d^{m-M}), without requiring any classical communication. Here, (m) denotes the number of edges incident to each node and (M) the total number of edges in the network. For the complete ((N-1))-uniform hypergraph (K_N^{(N-1)}), this fidelity reduces to (1/d). We further prove that this value is optimal among all local-unitary strategies and exceeds the best fidelity achievable using only bipartite sources. For example, in the four-node case, the optimal fidelity is (1/2), compared with the bipartite bound of (1/8). These results demonstrate that multipartite sources, together with shared randomness, can replace real-time classical communication for entanglement distribution.
summary:
分布式多部分纠缠是可扩展量子网络的先决条件。仅限于本地操作和共享随机性 (LOSR) 的网络避免了与基于 LOCC 的网络所需的实时经典通信相关的量子内存和延迟成本。然而，当只有双向源可用时，LOSR 网络无法准备有用的 GHZ 状态。在早期的工作中，我们推测多方来源克服了这一限制，并通过一个数值示例支持了这一主张。在这项工作中，我们证明了任意大小的规则且均匀网络的猜想。通过用线性代码的坐标识别网络的超边，我们表明，每当与每个节点相关的边形成信息集时，本地酉的固定集合，即代码的本地解码器，都会将源状态转换为保真度 (d^{m-M}) 的 (N) 方 GHZ 状态，而不需要任何经典通信。这里，(m) 表示关联到每个节点的边的数量，(M) 表示网络中边的总数。对于完整的 ((N-1))-均匀超图 (K_N^{(N-1)})，此保真度降低到 (1/d)。

我们进一步证明，该值在所有局部统一策略中是最优的，并且超过了仅使用二分源可实现的最佳保真度。例如，在四节点情况下，最佳保真度为 (1/2)，而二分界为 (1/8)。这些结果表明，多方源与共享随机性一起可以取代实时经典通信来实现纠缠分布。

title: A Correlation Aware Quantum Feature Map for Variational Quantum Classification
abstract: Quantum machine learning has emerged as a promising research area for learning complex data patterns. However, most existing quantum feature maps employ fixed encoding strategies that do not explicitly consider the relationships among features within a dataset. In this study, we propose a Correlation Aware Quantum Feature Map (CAQFM) which integrates feature dependencies into the quantum encoding process. The proposed approach utilizes Pearson, Spearman, Kendall Tau, Mutual Information, and Distance Correlation measures to identify relationships among features. Dependencies exceeding a predefined threshold are incorporated into the quantum circuit through controlled quantum gates, enabling the construction of richer quantum representations that better reflect the underlying structure of the data. The proposed method is evaluated using a Variational Quantum Classifier (VQC) on three benchmark datasets, namely breast cancer diagnosis, credit default prediction, and student placement classification. Simulation results demonstrate that correlation based quantum encoding can improve classification performance compared to conventional encoding strategies. In particular, the Spearman and Kendall Tau based CAQFM variants achieved the highest predictive performance and consistently outperformed standard quantum feature maps. The findings indicate that incorporating dependency information from classical data into quantum feature maps facilitates the generation of more discriminative quantum representations and enhances the effectiveness of variational quantum classifiers.
summary:
量子机器学习已成为学习复杂数据模式的一个有前途的研究领域。然而，大多数现有的量子特征图采用固定的编码策略，没有明确考虑数据集中特征之间的关系。在本研究中，我们提出了一种相关感知量子特征图（CAQFM），它将特征依赖性集成到量子编码过程中。所提出的方法利用 Pearson、Spearman、Kendall Tau、互信息和距离相关性度量来识别特征之间的关系。超过预定义阈值的依赖关系通过受控量子门合并到量子电路中，从而能够构建更丰富的量子表示，更好地反映数据的底层结构。使用变分量子分类器（VQC）对三个基准数据集（即乳腺癌诊断、信用违约预测和学生安置分类）对所提出的方法进行评估。仿真结果表明，与传统编码策略相比，基于相关性的量子编码可以提高分类性能。

特别是，基于 Spearman 和 Kendall Tau 的 CAQFM 变体实现了最高的预测性能，并且始终优于标准量子特征图。研究结果表明，将经典数据中的依赖信息合并到量子特征图中有助于生成更具辨别力的量子表示，并增强变分量子分类器的有效性。

title: No-signaling values of quantum games--an operator algebra perspective
abstract: The aim of this work is to study two-prover quantum games (i.e., games with quantum inputs and outputs) from an operator-algebraic and operator-space point of view. We characterize several notions of the value of such games by formulating them in terms of tensor norms in the category of operator spaces. The main results of the paper concern the description of the so-called no-signalling value of these games, for which we not only provide a precise operator-space formulation, but also establish close connections between this study and some problems in operator algebras. In particular, we show how the recent counterexample to Grothendieck's theorem for operator spaces given in \cite{Ara} can be understood as a direct consequence of results in quantum information theory. We also obtain new upper bounds on the gap between the no-signalling value and the quantum value of two-prover quantum games, improving the best previously known estimates.
summary: 这项工作的目的是从算子代数和算子空间的角度研究两个证明者量子博弈（即具有量子输入和输出的博弈）。我们通过根据算子空间类别中的张量范数来表述此类游戏的价值的几个概念。论文的主要结果涉及这些博弈的所谓无信号值的描述，为此我们不仅提供了精确的算子空间公式，而且在本研究和算子代数中的一些问题之间建立了密切的联系。特别是，我们展示了 \cite{Ara} 中给出的算子空间的格洛腾迪克定理的最新反例如何可以被理解为量子信息论结果的直接结果。我们还获得了两个证明者量子博弈的无信号值和量子值之间差距的新上限，从而改进了先前已知的最佳估计。

title: Instabilities of the continuous superradiant laser
abstract: We investigate the intensity stability of the superradiant laser. Our study focuses on the architecture where a continuous beam of atoms in an electronically excited state crosses the mode of a high-finesse Fabry-Perot cavity, which has been proposed as a new architecture of an active optical clock. We show that such superradiant laser can become unstable and develop chaotic behavior. We derive an analytical criterion for this instability and find that it may only occur when the lifetime of photons in the cavity is significantly shorter than the lifetime of atoms. This criterion allows for refining the necessary parameters to run a superradiant laser as a frequency reference in the optical domain. In particular, we point-out the consequences of the instability on intensity fluctuations and laser linewidth. On the other hand, we also point out that the superradiant laser, when in the unstable regime, can become an interesting playground for studying chaos. At the mean-field level, there is a direct mapping to the Bénard instability associated with fluid turbulence; however quantum fluctuations associated with photon out-coupling and atom re-filling substantially modify the expected behaviors. Finally, we point-out the existence of a regular self-pulsing regime at large atom numbers.
summary:
我们研究了超辐射激光的强度稳定性。我们的研究重点是处于电子激发态的连续原子束穿过高精细法布里-珀罗腔的模式的结构，该结构被提议作为有源光学时钟的新结构。我们证明这种超辐射激光会变得不稳定并产生混沌行为。我们推导出这种不稳定性的分析标准，并发现只有当腔中光子的寿命明显短于原子的寿命时，这种不稳定性才可能发生。该标准允许细化运行超辐射激光器作为光域频率参考所需的参数。我们特别指出了不稳定对强度波动和激光线宽的影响。另一方面，我们还指出，超辐射激光在不稳定状态下可以成为研究混沌的有趣场所。

在平均场水平上，可以直接映射到与流体湍流相关的贝纳德不稳定性；然而，与光子耦合和原子重新填充相关的量子涨落极大地改变了预期的行为。最后，我们指出在大原子数下存在规则的自脉冲状态。

title: On a Central Limit Theorem and Sanov's principle for quantum neural networks
abstract: In this work, we study the fluctuations of a Mixture of Experts (MoE) generated by a quantum neural network trained via gradient flow on supervised learning problems. Our main results establish the Central Limit Theorem (CLT), and Sanov's principle for an MoE as the number of experts diverges. We demonstrate that the fluctuations of the empirical measure of its parameters close to its corresponding limit probability measure solve a linear transport equation. As a byproduct, we show that the MoE converges to a limit function which solves an evolution equation governed by the neural tangent kernel associated with the quantum neural network.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们研究了由通过监督学习问题的梯度流训练的量子神经网络生成的专家混合 (MoE) 的波动。我们的主要结果建立了中心极限定理（CLT），以及萨诺夫在专家数量不同时的 MoE 原理。我们证明，其参数的经验测量的波动接近其相应的极限概率测量，可以求解线性输运方程。作为副产品，我们表明 MoE 收敛到一个极限函数，该函数求解由与量子神经网络相关的神经正切核控制的演化方程。

title: Prethermal cooling with many-body quantum quenches
abstract: Many-body quantum quenches are typically associated with heating. In this work, we show that quantum quenches that perform positive work on the system can still lead to effective cooling of low-energy degrees of freedom if the quench energy is deposited in long-lived high-energy excitations. We discuss this explicitly for a quench of the hopping term t in the strong-coupling (U >> t) fermionic Hubbard model at half filling, where the quench induces a very long-lived non-equilibrium doublon density. The associated prethermal state persists for a time exponentially large in (U/t)^2. During this time window, we find an effective prethermal temperature that is reduced by the square of the ratio of final to initial hopping amplitude with respect to the initial temperature. This manifests as an effective fluctuation-dissipation relation that holds for doublon-number conserving operators. In a practical implementation the Hubbard system acts as a refrigerant to cool a target system provided the coupling conserves doublon number. Our protocol can be thought of as a quantum quench many-body generalization of adiabatic demagnetization.
summary: 多体量子猝灭通常与加热有关。在这项工作中，我们表明，如果淬灭能量沉积在长寿命的高能激发中，对系统执行正功的量子淬灭仍然可以导致低能自由度的有效冷却。我们明确讨论了半填充时强耦合 (U >> t) 费米子哈伯德模型中跳跃项 t 的淬灭，其中淬灭引起非常长寿命的非平衡双布朗密度。相关的预热状态持续的时间呈指数级增长（U/t）^2。在此时间窗口内，我们发现有效的预热温度降低了最终跳跃幅度与初始跳跃幅度相对于初始温度之比的平方。这表现为适用于双倍数守恒算子的有效波动耗散关系。在实际实施中，哈伯德系统充当制冷剂来冷却目标系统，前提是联轴器保留双克隆数。我们的协议可以被认为是绝热退磁的量子淬灭多体推广。

title: Dynamical Tipping in a Quantum Limit Cycle
abstract: Nonequilibrium systems maintain spatiotemporal order through energy dissipation and entropy production. Here, we demonstrate this principle by engineering a quantum limit cycle that emerges from the interplay between a first-order absorbing-state phase transition and feedback mechanism coupling order and control parameters. The quantum limit cycle manifests dynamical correlations driven by multiplicative quantum noise and periodic traverses through tipping points, which act as a robust early-warning signal for state transitions. This periodic crossing results in the enhanced dynamical susceptibility and transient rise of long-range correlations near each tipping event and their subsequent disappearance away from it. These critical transitions are accompanied by a sharp increase in the energy dissipation rate, leading to a stepwise accumulation of dynamical entropy production over time. Our results provide a way for realizing dynamical fluctuations and long-range correlations in strongly interacting driven-dissipative open quantum systems.
summary: 非平衡系统通过能量耗散和熵产生来维持时空秩序。在这里，我们通过设计一个量子极限环来证明这一原理，该极限环是由一阶吸收态相变与反馈机制耦合阶数和控制参数之间的相互作用产生的。量子极限环表现出由乘性量子噪声驱动的动态相关性和通过临界点的周期性遍历，这充当了状态转换的强大预警信号。这种周期性交叉导致动态敏感性增强，每个倾倒事件附近的长程相关性瞬时上升，并随后在远离该事件时消失。这些临界转变伴随着能量耗散率的急剧增加，导致动态熵产生随着时间的推移逐步积累。我们的结果提供了一种在强相互作用驱动耗散开放量子系统中实现动态涨落和长程相关性的方法。

title: Shuttling in Bidimensional Segmented Ion-Trap Quantum Processors with T-Junctions
abstract: Shuttle-based trapped ion quantum processors typically employ a one-dimensional (1D) linear architecture to transport ion-qubits between one ore more laser interaction zones where the quantum gates are implemented, along with several qubit register storage segments. The two-dimensional (2D) quantum CCD architecture employs also T- or X-junctions for an improved scaling and efficiency. Here, we explore the shuttling layer in the compilation of quantum algorithm typical building blocks in such architecture. To weight the effort of linear shuttle and junction shuttle, we introduce individual cost functions for each operation. This allows comparing the total cost for quantum circuit building blocks such as the QFT, Carry, Adder, Shift, and Comparator circuits. We study their scaling properties with increased qubit numbers. At equivalent transport cost for junction and linear shuttling, we show that 2D architectures outperform the 1D linear trap with the ratio improving as the number of ions increases. Finally, we discuss the use of cells, such that the entire processor is constructed from a 2D array of such interconnected cells. The work aims to optimize quantum processor architectures, implementing a co-design that fits to the specific task and scaling up in a shuttle-efficient way.
summary:
基于穿梭的俘获离子量子处理器通常采用一维 (1D) 线性架构，以及多个量子位寄存器存储段，在实现量子门的一个或多个激光相互作用区域之间传输离子量子位。二维 (2D) 量子 CCD 架构还采用 T 或 X 结来提高尺寸和效率。在这里，我们探讨了此类架构中量子算法典型构建块编译中的穿梭层。为了权衡线性班车和枢纽班车的工作量，我们为每个操作引入单独的成本函数。这样可以比较量子电路构建模块（例如 QFT、进位、加法器、移位和比较器电路）的总成本。我们通过增加量子比特数来研究它们的缩放特性。在结点和线性穿梭的传输成本相同的情况下，我们表明 2D 架构优于 1D 线性陷阱，并且比率随着离子数量的增加而提高。最后，我们讨论单元的使用，以便整个处理器由此类互连单元的 2D 阵列构造而成。

这项工作旨在优化量子处理器架构，实施适合特定任务的协同设计，并以高效的方式进行扩展。

title: Transient Information Partition in Coherent Exciton-Phonon-Photon Dynamics
abstract: We study transient information partition in a coherent exciton-phonon-photon system using subsystem-resolved quantum mutual information (QMI). By employing a model with excitonic, phononic, and photonic degrees of freedom, we analyze the dynamics in the $J$-$\nu$ plane, where $J$ characterizes excitonic delocalization and $\nu$ denotes the exciton-phonon coupling strength. By comparing time-averaged QMI maps with the absorbed photon number, we show that optical activity alone does not determine the character of the light-induced transient state. The exciton-centered information partition identifies a broad crossover between polariton-like and polaron-like transient responses, depending on whether excitonic information is mainly shared with the photon or phonon subsystem. In contrast, the phonon-centered partition reveals a sharper boundary-adjacent redistribution ridge near the boundary between the zero- and one-exciton ground-state sectors. This ridge is absent from both the ground-state sector map and the photon-absorption map, indicating that it is neither a static sector boundary nor an enhancement of optical absorption. A variational strength-function analysis connects the ridge to a region-II-like finite-energy polaronic excitation whose dominant spectral weight lies near the one-phonon energy, and thus the ridge represents a hidden transient correlation structure in which a limited amount of phonon-related information is preferentially shared with the photon subsystem before being predominantly allocated to exciton-phonon dressing. These results show that QMI-based information partition provides a correlation-based framework for characterizing coherent light-induced transient states in which optical and material degrees of freedom jointly participate quantum mechanically.
summary:
我们使用子系统分辨的量子互信息（QMI）研究相干激子-声子-光子系统中的瞬态信息划分。通过采用具有激子、声子和光子自由度的模型，我们分析了 $J$-$\nu$ 平面上的动力学，其中 $J$ 表征激子离域，$\nu$ 表示激子-声子耦合强度。通过比较时间平均 QMI 图与吸收光子数，我们表明光活动本身并不能决定光诱导瞬态的特征。以激子为中心的信息划分确定了类极化子和类极化子瞬态响应之间的广泛交叉，具体取决于激子信息是否主要与光子或声子子系统共享。相比之下，声子中心分区在零激子基态扇区和一激子基态扇区之间的边界附近显示出更尖锐的边界相邻再分布脊。该脊在基态扇区图和光子吸收图中均不存在，表明它既不是静态扇区边界，也不是光吸收的增强。

变分强度函数分析将脊连接到类似 II 区的有限能量极化子激发，其主要光谱权重位于单声子能量附近，因此脊代表了一种隐藏的瞬态相关结构，其中有限数量的声子相关信息在主要分配给激子-声子修饰之前优先与光子子系统共享。这些结果表明，基于 QMI 的信息划分提供了一个基于相关性的框架，用于表征相干光引起的瞬态，其中光学和材料自由度共同参与量子力学。

title: Spectral and thermodynamic properties of supersymmetric quantum systems with self-adjoint deformed momentum
abstract: We establish a rigorous framework for quantum systems with geometric deformations by constructing a strictly self-adjoint deformed momentum operator through the generalized extended momentum operator (GEMO) formalism. Unlike previous approaches relying on boundary-condition hermiticity, our method ensures intrinsic self-adjointness for both linear ($\mu(x)=\alpha x$) and quadratic ($\mu(x)=\alpha x^{2}$) deformations within a unified non-Hermitian supersymmetric factorization scheme. This yields exact analytical spectra while revealing hidden $\mathfrak{su}(1,1)$ symmetry structures. Crucially, we provide the first complete thermodynamic characterization of such systems by analytically evaluating the partition function via the Euler--Maclaurin approximation. Geometric deformation fundamentally reshapes the density of states $\rho(E)$, producing distinct thermal signatures: a divergent heat capacity peak for linear deformation due to state accumulation near a maximal energy, and a saturation $C/k_{\mathrm{B}}\to 0.6$ (below the Dulong--Petit limit) for quadratic deformation. These results establish geometric deformation as a tunable parameter for engineering quantum thermodynamic responses in curved nanostructures.
summary:
我们通过广义扩展动量算子（GEMO）形式构造严格自伴变形动量算子，为具有几何变形的量子系统建立了严格的框架。与之前依赖边界条件厄密性的方法不同，我们的方法确保统一非厄米超对称分解方案中线性 ($\mu(x)=\alpha x$) 和二次 ($\mu(x)=\alpha x^{2}$) 变形的内在自伴性。这会产生精确的分析光谱，同时揭示隐藏的 $\mathfrak{su}(1,1)$ 对称结构。至关重要的是，我们通过欧拉-麦克劳林近似分析评估配分函数，首次提供了此类系统的完整热力学表征。几何变形从根本上重塑了态密度$\rho(E)$，产生不同的热特征：由于接近最大能量的状态积累而导致线性变形的发散热容峰值，以及二次变形的饱和度$C/k_{\mathrm{B}}\至0.6$（低于杜隆-佩蒂特极限）。

这些结果将几何变形确立为弯曲纳米结构中工程量子热力学响应的可调参数。

title: Emergence of Boolean Facts from Markovian Coarse-Graining in Relational Quantum Causal Processes
abstract: We formulate an operator-algebraic mechanism by which exact Boolean records can arise from local completely positive quantum operations without being imposed as microscopic structure. The kinematic input is an algebraic process functional assigning probabilities to local normal completely positive operations in a finite operational context. From the predual response of a target algebra to source interventions, relative to a background strategy class, we define an influence algebra; exact events are then, by definition, the projections in its center. The dynamical question is whether nontrivial centers can be generated by coarse-graining rather than inserted through split-record laboratories. We address this question using state-preserving normal unital completely positive coarse-graining channels. If the Cesaro means of such a channel converge to a Choi-Effros infrared range and the range is asymptotically abelian in the GNS seminorm, then the represented infrared algebra is a commutative von Neumann algebra. Its projection lattice is therefore a complete Boolean algebra. We also give a finite-sector block-primitive criterion, motivated by locality and scrambling, which implies this asymptotic abelianness with exponential suppression of off-sector coherences and intra-sector fluctuations. The result is a conservative mathematical statement: classical facts are not identified with arbitrary projections of a Type-III local algebra, but with central projections selected by an asymptotically abelian completely positive infrared limit.
summary:
我们制定了一种算子代数机制，通过该机制可以从局部完全正的量子运算中产生精确的布尔记录，而无需强加为微观结构。运动学输入是一个代数过程函数，在有限的操作环境中将概率分配给局部正常完全正操作。从目标代数对源干预的预响应，相对于背景策略类，我们定义了影响代数；根据定义，确切的事件就是其中心的投影。动态问题是非平凡中心是否可以通过粗粒度生成，而不是通过分裂记录实验室插入。我们使用状态保持正常单位完全正粗粒度通道来解决这个问题。如果这种通道的塞萨罗均值收敛于 Choi-Effros 红外范围，并且该范围在 GNS 半范数中渐近阿贝尔，则所表示的红外代数是可交换冯诺依曼代数。因此，它的投影格是一个完整的布尔代数。
